summary: V3 Polish (Visualizer Pricing config, Share tokens, Launch email) — fully verified. 10/10 backend pytest tests passed; frontend admin page, pricing save, dry-run, public share viewer, and bad-token error all working end-to-end. Pricing reset to defaults after testing.

issues: Pre-existing React warning: 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop' in AdminDashboard render — unrelated to V3 polish work, but should be cleaned up.

critical_code_review_comments: routes/visualizer.py send_launch_email marks the FIRST sent_total emails as notified — but if Resend returns ok=False on the 2nd batch, the algorithm still slices emails[:sent_total] (sum of OK batches) and may mark the wrong subset since failures may be in earlier batches. Edge-case: works fine when there is only one batch (current production scenario, batch=40).
PRICING_DEFAULTS in routes/visualizer.py and DEFAULT_* constants in services/visualizer.py are duplicated — single source-of-truth would prevent drift if defaults change.

_load_visualizer_pricing rejects v == '' but not v == 0; sending wastage_percent=0 via PUT is allowed (good), but loader also accepts 0 (correct). No bug, just noting clamp wastage_percent allows 0 which is intended.
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up several visualizer_sessions + 1 fast render + 1 share token via the live API during test_share_idempotent_and_public_get; harmless in-DB state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_visualizer_v3_polish.py. They cover pricing GET/PUT round-trip with bound-clamping, share token idempotency + public access + bad-token 404 + 'no render yet' 404, quote-uses-admin-pricing, and dry-run launch email. Pricing is RESET to defaults at end (TestZZReset). Frontend playwright covered admin page render, pricing save toast, dry-run preview, public /visualizer/share/<token> page, and bad-token error card. The known share token 40575bba2fb941 is still valid. Sidebar 'Tile Visualizer' link is nested under Communication section (collapsed by default) — verified to exist in /app/frontend/src/components/Layout.js line 213 with route /admin/visualizer; clicking the route works.
